name: Craggy-Topped Fudge Brownies
recipeInstructions: Heat sugar and butter in a saucepan over low heat, stirring until the butter is melted. Remove from heat. Add 1 1/2 cups of chocolate chips; stir until melted. Stir in eggs. Combine flour, vanilla, and baking soda. Spread mixture into a greased 13 x 9 baking pan. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 18 - 22 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out slightly sticky. Sprinkle with remaining chocolate chips and nuts while still hot. Cover with foil. Chill in the pan until completely cooled. Cut into bars.
